text_en: Resolution 116(VI) adopted by the Commission at its 113th meeting on 2 March 1964
text_fr: Resolution 116(VI) adoptee par la Commission a sa 113e Ie 2 mars 1964 seance pleniere

text_en: Convinced of the need for recognized vocational training for social work,
text_fr: Convaincue de la necessite d'une formation professionnelle reconnue en vue du travail social,

text_en: ~ the need to intensify the training of social workers at all levels, including teachers and administrators of sooial services in the region,
text_fr: ~naissant la necessite d'intensifier la formation de travailleurs sociaux a tous les niveaux, y compris les enseignants et les administrateurs de services sooiaux dans la region,

text_en: Referring to its Resolution 49(IV) of 28 February 1962 requesting the Executive Secretary to grant high priority and permanent status to the formation of Community and social security systems,
text_fr: Rap~e~ant sa rcsnlution 49(IV) du 28 fevrier 1962 priant Ie Secretaire executif d'accorder une haute priorite et un statut permanent a la formation d ans Ie d orna in e du d cveLoppemen t communautaire et de La protection socia1e,

text_en: I.e. programme of work and order of priorities for 1964-1965 (E/CN.14/267) and in particular the section on training for social work,
text_fr: ~yant examine avec satisfaction I.e programme de travail et l'ordre de priorites pour 1964-1965 (E/CN.14/267) et particulierement la section sur la formation en vue dv travail social,

text_en: 1. Requests the EX8-Ecutif to assist the brooding, with their damand, in 11 artS'anization of training courses in employment COUTS for the mechanical workers including the voluntary leaders and auxiliaries'.

text_en: 2. Draws the attention of the governments of the region to the need to coordinate their efforts with the Commission and other international bodies in order to strengthen social training schools;
text_fr: 2. Attire l'attention des gouvernements de la r£,,,ion sur la n ec e ss i to de coordonner leurs efforts avec la Commission et les autres organismes internationaux afin de renforcer les ecoles de formation sociale;

text_en: Requests the Executive Secretary, in collaboration with the Social Affairs Office, the FlSE, UNESCO and other agencies specialising in this field, to undertake on-the-spot studies of existing social-based schools in the region to determine their needs and areas in which they could be strengthened.
text_fr: Prie Ie Secretaire executif, en collaboration avec Ie Bureau des affaires sociales, Ie FlSE, l'UNESCO et les autres agences specialisees dans ce domaine, d'entreprendre des etudes sur place des ecoles de format~on sociale existant dans la region alln de determiner leurs besoins et les domaines dans lesquels elles poUrraient etre renforcees.
